title: 8 Herbal Creams For Cold Sore
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. These properties help to reduce the pain, swelling, and duration of cold sores. The creams also contain antioxidants like vitamin C and E, which can help to boost the immune system and fight off the herpes simplex virus that causes cold sores.
